response: TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF THE HEAT ENERGY IN A SUBSTANCE. IT IS USED TO DESCRIBE HOW HOT OR COLD A THING IS. THE UNIT OF TEMPERATURE IN THE METRIC SYSTEM IS THE CELSIUS SCALE. IN SCIENCE, TEMPERATURE IS A KEY FACTOR IN MANY EXPERIMENTS. IT AFFECTS THE RATE OF CHEMICAL REACTIONS AND PHYSICAL CHANGES. THE HIGHER THE TEMPERATURE, THE FASTER THE MOLECULES MOVE. THIS MOVEMENT IS WHAT WE FEEL AS HEAT. TEMPERATURE CAN BE MEASURED WITH A THERMOMETER. IT IS IMPORTANT TO KNOW THE TEMPERATURE OF FOOD TO ENSURE IT IS SAFE TO EAT. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE ATMOSPHERE AFFECTS WEATHER PATTERNS. IT ALSO INFLUENCES THE GROWTH OF PLANTS AND ANIMALS. THE WORD ROLL IS USED IN THIS SENTENCE AS THE SECOND WORD. TEMPERATURE IS A FUNDAMENTAL CONCEPT IN PHYSICS AND CHEMISTRY. IT IS ESSENTIAL TO UNDERSTAND TEMPERATURE TO STUDY THE BEHAVIOR OF MATTER.
